name: Donald J. Trump
subject: Kicking and screaming
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican National Committee
body:
We absolutely must drain the swamp. |

Peter,

This month... the media tried to stop us.

...The establishment tried to stop us.

...The bureaucracy even tried to sabotage us from within.

_**But WE THE PEOPLE FOUGHT BACK!**__AND WE ARE STILL STANDING_ AND WILL KEEP FIGHTING UNTIL WE MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!

_The Washington elites will go kicking and screaming until they 've all been dethroned._

Right now, we're just $142,693 away from hitting our FEC end-of-month goal. Will you contribute any amount -- I mean it, Peter, any amount you can -- to help us end the month so strong that the Fake News Media Machine falls into a complete panic?

[CONTRIBUTE $100 TO DRAIN THE SWAMP](http://click1.action.gop.com/lzgfwpklnyzrjpjprdcdkrskqsrlqqdcfgjdgmsmggwhdg_ssrbsslkkjm_orkmrzfr.html?a=17786605)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 TO DRAIN THE SWAMP](http://click1.action.gop.com/chgkjrdslnhfcrcrfgzgdfvdqvfsqqgzkpcgptvtppjmgg_ssrbsslkkjm_fgbrgsqg.html?a=17786605)
[CONTRIBUTE $25 TO DRAIN THE SWAMP](http://click1.action.gop.com/ymkpbrlwgzmnkrkrnftflnylcynwccftpqkfqsysqqbvfk_ssrbsslkkjm_mbtsbqwb.html?a=17786605)
[CONTRIBUTE $15 TO DRAIN THE SWAMP](http://click1.action.gop.com/pflrctqglsfbmtmtbykyqbwqdwbgddykrjmyjhwhjjcvyl_ssrbsslkkjm_qpvhpwnp.html?a=17786605)
[CONTRIBUTE $5 TO DRAIN THE SWAMP](http://click1.action.gop.com/hnhlhrqdwgnzcrcrzspsqzjqmjzdmmsplbcsbvjvbbhfsh_ssrbsslkkjm_lwdqwkzw.html?a=17786605)
[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT](http://click1.action.gop.com/lzqfwpklnyzrjpjprdcdkrskqsrlqqdcfgjdgmsmggwhdq_ssrbsslkkjm_nrtjrywr.html?a=17786605)

Thanks,

[](http://click1.action.gop.com/gwmjlqyfthwdrqrqdkpkydsynsdfnnkpjgrkgcscgglmkm_ssrbsslkkjm_tmbjmzwm.html?a=17786605)
Donald J. Trump

[CONTRIBUTE $100 TO DRAIN THE SWAMP](http://click1.action.gop.com/bfpscklnqtdygkgkyjmjlyvlbvynbbjmsfgjfpvpffczgd_ssrbsslkkjm_rtkwtrjt.html?a=17786605)

You are receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com
Republican National Committee (RNC), 310 1st St SE Washington, DC, 20003-1885, US

We believe this is an important way to reach our grassroots supporters with the most up-to-date information regarding the efforts of the Republican Party and President Trump, and we're glad you're on our team. It's because of grassroots supporters like you that we will Make America Great Again, and we appreciate your support. Thank you for all that you do!

[Privacy Policy](http://click1.action.gop.com/jjjzqhrpmdswvhvhwtktrwcrfcwpfftkzjvtjbcbjjqnvr_ssrbsslkkjm_eztpzsdz.html?a=17786605) | [Unsubscribe](http://click1.action.gop.com/adyvtzkcpwbnhzhznygyknrksrncssygvdhydmrmddtlhd_ssrbsslkkjm_jqtfqrsq.html?a=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&b=17786605)

name: Tom Perez
subject: Trump's budget proposal is immoral, Derek. Say you'll fight it:
body:
Stand with Democrats against Trump's new budget.
---
**Donald Trump's budget is a direct assault on working Americans. Add your name to tell Congress to reject it:

** **[ADD YOUR NAME](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Defeat-the-Trump-Budget1?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=em_20170528_tp_nd&source=em_20170528_tp_nd")**

We just got our hands on Trump's budget proposal, Derek. **[We have to fight this with everything we've got.](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Defeat-the-Trump-Budget1?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+We+have+to+fight+this+with+everything+we&utm_campaign=em_20170528_tp_nd&source=em_20170528_tp_nd")**

$800 billion cut from Medicaid. $193 billion stripped from food stamps and SNAP. $9 billion taken from education funding, including $1.4 billion shifted from public education to promote so-called "school choice." The list goes on and on, but one thing's clear: this budget does the most harm to those who need the most help.

Donald Trump says he wants to make America great again. But, to paraphrase my friend Joe Biden, your budget says a lot about what you value -- and this budget reveals that Donald Trump does not value the hardworking Americans who truly make this country great.

**The bottom line is this budget proposal cannot become law. So make sure Republicans in Congress know where you stand. Add your name and tell them to reject Trump's budget:**

**[ADD YOUR NAME](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Defeat-the-Trump-Budget1?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=em_20170528_tp_nd&source=em_20170528_tp_nd")**
This is really important, Derek. Thank you so much for making your voice heard today.

Tom

Tom Perez
Chair
Democratic National Committee

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cd2e/4067b0a/292602109/7e76c3aa/1233558125/VEsC/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170528_tp_nd&source=em_20170528_tp_nd"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cd2e/4067b0a/292602109/7e76c3ab/1233558125/VEsD/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170528_tp_nd&source=em_20170528_tp_nd"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cd2e/4067b0a/292602109/7e76c3a8/1233558125/VEsA/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170528_tp_nd&source=em_20170528_tp_nd") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cd2e/4067b0a/292602109/7e76c3a9/1233558125/VEsB/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170528_tp_nd&source=em_20170528_tp_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

"" $800 billion cut from Medicaid. $193 billion stripped from food stamps and SNAP. $9 billion taken from education funding, including $1.4 billion shifted from public education to promote so-called "school choice." The list goes on and on, but one thing's clear: this budget does the most harm to those who need the most help. Donald Trump says he wants to make America great again. But, to paraphrase my friend Joe Biden, your budget says a lot about what you value -- and this budget reveals that Donald Trump does not value the hardworking Americans who truly make this country great. The bottom line is this budget proposal cannot become law. So make sure Republicans in Congress know where you stand. Add your name and tell them to reject Trump's budget: "" This is really important, Derek. Thank you so much for making your voice heard today. Tom Tom Perez Chair Democratic National Committee Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

name: Paul Ryan
subject: Re: our deadline
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Ryan, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Ryan for Congress, Inc
body:
Friend --

After enduring 8 years under a president who kept our country stuck in neutral, President Trump and House Republicans are moving our country forward with our ambitious agenda.
* Our military was underfunded and hollowed out._**We 're rebuilding it.**_
* Our borders were left unsecured. _**We 're securing them and fixing our broken immigration system.**_
* Liberal policies caused businesses to close their doors or move overseas. _**We 're making it easier to start businesses and create jobs right here in America.**_
* Obamacare premiums increased by an average of 105%. _**We 're repealing and replacing it.**_

[**But I need your help, Friend.**](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjkxNjY3NjMS1&r=NDY4NTQ0MTA2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTA0MzU2NTM5MgS2&mt=1&rt=0) The liberal opposition -- from the media to big Hollywood donors -- has intensified. They're blocking us at every opportunity and preventing us from enacting our solutions that make life better for Americans, like you.

[**_Show your support -- chip in now >>_**](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjkxNjY3NjMS1&r=NDY4NTQ0MTA2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTA0MzU2NTM5MgS2&mt=1&rt=0)

We need you now, Friend. We have until midnight on May 31st to show the Democrats that the majority of Americans are with us and support our conservative agenda.
****[**
Chip in $50 now >>**](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjkxNjY3NjMS1&r=NDY4NTQ0MTA2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTA0MzU2NTM5MgS2&mt=1&rt=0)****

[**Chip in $25 now >>**](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjkxNjY3NjMS1&r=NDY4NTQ0MTA2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTA0MzU2NTM5MgS2&mt=1&rt=0)****

[**Chip in $10 now >>**](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjkxNjY3NjMS1&r=NDY4NTQ0MTA2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTA0MzU2NTM5MgS2&mt=1&rt=0)****

[**Chip in $5 now >>**](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjkxNjY3NjMS1&r=NDY4NTQ0MTA2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTA0MzU2NTM5MgS2&mt=1&rt=0)

Please consider making a contribution before our deadline is up.

Thank you,

Paul Ryan

| [Take a stand now ](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjkxNjY3NjMS1&r=NDY4NTQ0MTA2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTA0MzU2NTM5MgS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---

Paid for by Team Ryan, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Ryan for Congress, Inc., Prosperity Action, Inc., and the NRCC.

Team Ryan
320 First Street, SE
Washington, D.C. 20003
---

This message reflects the opinions and representations of Team Ryan. You are receiving this email because you signed up as a member of Team Ryan's online community. Click [here](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/servlet/OneClickOptOutServlet?m=29166763&r=NDY4NTQ0MTA2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTA0MzU2NTM5MgS2&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe from Team Ryan.

name: Leigh K. Warren, EMILY's List
subject: Before May is over >>
body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c793e/24c69fd9/e578ad49/18e495b2/4101805085/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFE536N_digital_email_20170528_MaySupporterRecord_inact&source=WQEFE536N_digital_email_20170528_MaySupporterRecord_inact")
---

Peter,

Since day one of Donald Trump's presidency, we've been out in full force fueling the resistance and standing with our pro-choice Democratic women against Trump's dangerous administration. Now we're focusing on bringing the resistance to the ballot box and helping more women run for office than ever before.

We've got some tough races ahead of us in 2018, and we're planning to do as much as we can for as many women as we can. That's why I'm checking our records to make sure everyone who cares about this work is involved.

Here are our records associated with this exact email address:
**2017 EMILY's List donor:** Pending
**[Suggested action: Donate $3 or more](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c793e/24c69fd9/e578ad49/18e495ac/4101805085/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170524_email_MayEOM?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+Suggested+action+Donate+3+or+more&utm_campaign=WQEFE536N_digital_email_20170528_MaySupporterRecord_inact&source=WQEFE536N_digital_email_20170528_MaySupporterRecord_inact")**
As Chief Operating Officer, it's my job to make sure our resources match our budget -- and vice versa. And our budget went up dramatically after the outpouring of energy after the election.

Over 13,000 women and counting have told us they want to run for office -- more than 13 times the number of women we heard from in 2016! Usually we have to do a lot of legwork in state and local races to ask women to run. This time, potential candidates are tweeting, emailing, and signing up on our website to tell us they're ready.

That's why we've launched a brand-new program, Run to Win, to support these women with trainings, webinars, and other online resources as they learn how to run campaigns.

That's on top of our mission to protect the nine of our 15 senators who are up for re-election next year and flip the House from Republicans' control.

I'm not complaining: We're more fired up than ever to help these candidates win.

But I do want to make sure we can be there for the thousands of women who are counting on us.

**Please donate $3 or more before midnight on Wednesday to help hit our End-of-Month goal:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Hit-Our-Goal](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c793e/24c69fd9/e578ad49/18e495ad/4101805085/VEsC/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170524_email_MayEOM?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=4+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgHitOurGoal&utm_campaign=WQEFE536N_digital_email_20170528_MaySupporterRecord_inact&source=WQEFE536N_digital_email_20170528_MaySupporterRecord_inact")**

Thank you,

Leigh K. Warren
Chief Operating Officer, EMILY's List

[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c793e/24c69fd9/e578ad49/18e495ae/4101805085/VEsD/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170524_email_MayEOM?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=5&utm_campaign=WQEFE536N_digital_email_20170528_MaySupporterRecord_inact&source=WQEFE536N_digital_email_20170528_MaySupporterRecord_inact")

\---
If you've donated recently, with a different email address, or offline, thank you! These records may not reflect those additional contributions, but don't worry, we have it recorded.

|
# EMILY's List is a community of over five million members that helps elect pro-choice Democratic women to office.
---

|
---
Paid for by EMILY's List [www.emilyslist.org](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c793e/24c69fd9/e578ad49/18e495af/4101805085/VEsA/ "http://www.emilyslist.org/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=6+-+wwwemilyslistorg&utm_campaign=WQEFE536N_digital_email_20170528_MaySupporterRecord_inact&source=WQEFE536N_digital_email_20170528_MaySupporterRecord_inact") and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
1800 M Street NW, Suite 375N, Washington, DC 20036 Thank you for being a supporter of EMILY's List. This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Inbox overcrowded? Sign up to get less email [here](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c793e/24c69fd9/e578ad49/18e495a8/4101805085/VEsB/ "http://action.emilyslist.org/page/s/less-email-private-bc?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=7+-+here&utm_campaign=WQEFE536N_digital_email_20170528_MaySupporterRecord_inact&source=WQEFE536N_digital_email_20170528_MaySupporterRecord_inact"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you want to stop receiving all email, unsubscribe [here](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c793e/24c69fd9/e578ad49/18e495a9/4101805085/VEsO/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=8+-+here&utm_campaign=WQEFE536N_digital_email_20170528_MaySupporterRecord_inact&source=WQEFE536N_digital_email_20170528_MaySupporterRecord_inact"). Have a question? Feel free to drop us a line at [information@emilyslist.org](mailto:information@emilyslist.org) or simply reply to this email.

Contributions or gifts to EMILY's List or endorsed candidates are not tax deductible.

name: Keith Ellison
subject: Host a kickoff event and help us start Resistance Summer off right!
body:
Start organizing with Democrats in your community
---
**Let's get ready for Resistance Summer! Sign up to host a kickoff event in your community on Saturday, June 3rd.

** **[I'LL HOST A KICKOFF EVENT](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cd2a/4067b0a/29179d488/7e76c1de/3229588766/VEsH/ "http://my.democrats.org/Create-Event?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+ILL+HOST+A+KICKOFF+EVENT&utm_campaign=em_20170528_ke_nd&source=em_20170528_ke_nd")**
Derek, we are so excited to have you on board for Resistance Summer 2017. This summer, we're investing in all 50 states and connecting with voters everywhere on the issues that matter to them -- from health care to education to jobs and economic opportunity. Thanks to you, this movement will be a force to elect Democrats in communities all across the country from city council to Congress.

**[Now, we need your help to start Resistance Summer off right with house parties across the country on Saturday, June 3rd at 4:30 p.m. EDT, featuring a kickoff livestream that I'll be hosting with some surprise guests! Can you sign up to host a kickoff event in your neighborhood?](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cd2a/4067b0a/29179d488/7e76c1df/3229588766/VEsE/ "http://my.democrats.org/Create-Event?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+Now+we+need+your+help+to+start+Resistanc&utm_campaign=em_20170528_ke_nd&source=em_20170528_ke_nd")**

All you'll need is a phone or laptop to join the call with me and our special guests, and to be willing to host some grassroots Democrats from your neighborhood! We'll make sure you have everything else you need to start organizing in your community.

**So, what do you say? Are you ready to get Resistance Summer started on Saturday, June 3rd?**

**[I'LL HOST A KICKOFF EVENT](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cd2a/4067b0a/29179d488/7e76c1dc/3229588766/VEsF/ "http://my.democrats.org/Create-Event?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+ILL+HOST+A+KICKOFF+EVENT&utm_campaign=em_20170528_ke_nd&source=em_20170528_ke_nd")**
Thank you so much, Derek. We'll get in touch soon with further details.

Keith

Keith Ellison
Deputy Chair
Democratic National Committee

P.S. -- Got any questions about hosting a Resistance Summer event? **[Drop us a note, and we'll get you the answers you need.](mailto:Resistancesummerevents@dnc.org)**

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cd2a/4067b0a/29179d488/7e76c1dd/3229588766/VEsC/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170528_ke_nd&source=em_20170528_ke_nd"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cd2a/4067b0a/29179d488/7e76c1da/3229588766/VEsD/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170528_ke_nd&source=em_20170528_ke_nd"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cd2a/4067b0a/29179d488/7e76c1db/3229588766/VEsA/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170528_ke_nd&source=em_20170528_ke_nd") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cd2a/4067b0a/29179d488/7e76c1d8/3229588766/VEsB/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170528_ke_nd&source=em_20170528_ke_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.
clean_body: Start organizing with Democrats in your community Let's get ready for Resistance Summer! Sign up to host a kickoff event in your community on Saturday, June 3rd. "" Derek, we are so excited to have you on board for Resistance Summer 2017. This summer, we're investing in all 50 states and connecting with voters everywhere on the issues that matter to them -- from health care to education to jobs and economic opportunity. Thanks to you, this movement will be a force to elect Democrats in communities all across the country from city council to Congress. "" All you'll need is a phone or laptop to join the call with me and our special guests, and to be willing to host some grassroots Democrats from your neighborhood! We'll make sure you have everything else you need to start organizing in your community. So, what do you say? Are you ready to get Resistance Summer started on Saturday, June 3rd? "" Thank you so much, Derek. We'll get in touch soon with further details. Keith Keith Ellison Deputy Chair Democratic National Committee P.S. -- Got any questions about hosting a Resistance Summer event? mailto:Resistancesummerevents@dnc.org Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

name: Contest via Team Ryan
subject: Who would you pick?

body:
Friend,

Flights to our nation's capital?

Hotel stay?

Tickets for you and a friend to attend a dinner with Vice President Mike Pence?

Sound good?[ **Enter now for a chance to win all of this for you and a friend >>**](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjkxNjY2ODgS1&r=NDY4NTQ0MTA2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTA0MzU2NDk1NwS2&mt=1&rt=0)

Hope to see you soon!

**[Enter today for a chance to win >>](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjkxNjY2ODgS1&r=NDY4NTQ0MTA2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTA0MzU2NDk1NwS2&mt=1&rt=0)**

Good luck!

Team Ryan

| [Enter to win >>](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjkxNjY2ODgS1&r=NDY4NTQ0MTA2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTA0MzU2NDk1NwS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---

NO PURCHASE NECESSARY TO ENTER OR WIN A PRIZE.

No contribution or payment of any kind is necessary to enter or win this Promotion. Making a contribution does not increase your chances of winning. To enter by making a contribution, [click here](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjkxNjY2ODgS1&r=NDY4NTQ0MTA2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTA0MzU2NDk1NwS2&mt=1&rt=0). To enter without making a contribution, [click here](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjkxNjY2ODgS1&r=NDY4NTQ0MTA2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTA0MzU2NDk1NwS2&mt=1&rt=0). Void where prohibited. The Promotion begins on May 26, 2017, at Noon (12:00 p.m.) Eastern Standard Time and ends on June 2, 2017, at 11:59 p.m. ("Entry Period"). All entries must be received by 11:59 p.m. Eastern Standard Time on the last day of the contest. One (1) winner will receive the following Prize: two (2) round-trip coach class plane tickets within the continental United States to Washington, DC, on a date to be determined by Sponsor, with an approximate retail value of $1,500; one (1) two-night hotel stay in the Washington, D.C., metro area with an approximate retail value of $1,300 and two (2) tickets to attend Dinner with Mike Pence on a day of the Sponsor's choosing ("Credential") with an approximate retail value of $0. Approximate total retail value is $2,800. Odds of winning depend on the number of entries received. The Promotion is open to citizens and permanent residents (green card holders) of the United States who are legal residents of one of the fifty states, Puerto Rico, or the District of Columbia and are at least 18 years of age or the age of majority as determined by state law. Details and qualifications for participation in this Promotion may apply. Restrictions are listed in the [Official Rules](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjkxNjY2ODgS1&r=NDY4NTQ0MTA2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTA0MzU2NDk1NwS2&mt=1&rt=0). Sponsor is Team Ryan, 320 1st St. SE, Washington, D.C. 20003.

name: records@maggiehassan.com
subject: Action needed from dpwillis67@gmail.com (re. important elections)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdea3/2a380d31/1a5a95f4/fe8753/4126062052/VEsH/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdea3/2a380d31/1a5a95f4/fe8753/4126062052/VEsE/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
Hello --
With Betsy DeVos slashing funds for public education and a President whose campaign is under investigation for ties with Russia, we need to fill competitive seats with strong Democrats who will hold DeVos and Trump accountable.
That starts with electing Jon Ossoff in Georgia's special election and reelecting Heidi Heitkamp to North Dakota's Senate seat.
According to our records, you haven't made a weekend donation to these make-or-break campaigns. [**Time is ticking (early voting in Georgia starts in just TWO DAYS), so please donate $3 or more to shore up critically important Democratic victories in Georgia and North Dakota:**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdea3/2a380d31/1a5a95f4/fe875c/4126062052/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoibXdoLTQtam9oaCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTcwNTI4X213aDRoaGpvMl9hbGwiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/mwh-4-johh?refcode=e20170528_mwh4hhjo2_all&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")
**EMAIL:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**HOLIDAY WEEKEND DONOR:** **[PENDING](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdea3/2a380d31/1a5a95f4/fe875c/4126062052/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoibXdoLTQtam9oaCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTcwNTI4X213aDRoaGpvMl9hbGwiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/mwh-4-johh?refcode=e20170528_mwh4hhjo2_all&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")**
**[RECOMMENDED ACTION: Donate $3 or more](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdea3/2a380d31/1a5a95f4/fe875c/4126062052/VEsD/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoibXdoLTQtam9oaCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTcwNTI4X213aDRoaGpvMl9hbGwiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/mwh-4-johh?refcode=e20170528_mwh4hhjo2_all&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")**

[Contribute](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdea3/2a380d31/1a5a95f4/fe875c/4126062052/VEsA/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoibXdoLTQtam9oaCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTcwNTI4X213aDRoaGpvMl9hbGwiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/mwh-4-johh?refcode=e20170528_mwh4hhjo2_all&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")
If we're going to elect the Democrats who will stand up to Betsy DeVos and Donald Trump, we can't take weekends off, and we have to do the work together, everyone. They need us to take action now.
Jon is slipping in the polls, and FIVE far-right groups have launched attacks against Heidi, so they're both really counting on our support. [**Please give $3 or more now, before tonight 's deadline, to help defeat Trump's agenda and launch Jon and Heidi to victory.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdea3/2a380d31/1a5a95f4/fe875c/4126062052/VEsB/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoibXdoLTQtam9oaCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTcwNTI4X213aDRoaGpvMl9hbGwiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/mwh-4-johh?refcode=e20170528_mwh4hhjo2_all&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")
Thank you for taking action,
Team Maggie

name: Andrew Gillum
subject: our proposal
body:
#
Team --
I firmly believe that we don't have to sacrifice our values to win elections. We can stand on principle for what's right and still win. And that's what we're doing in our campaign for Governor of Florida right now.
[**Help us carry out this bold strategy by contributing to our campaign before our critical end of month deadline >>**](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3324/9e00690/4be3881c/2403715f/2119862396/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ag-may2017?refcode=em20170528-eom")
Since we launched this campaign just a few months ago, we've been working to build the kind of campaign that the entire state can be proud of, that stands up for every Floridian, that gives hope to every family no matter their background or where they come from -- and a campaign that will win back the Governor's office after 20 long years.
Our proposal for Florida is pretty simple:
Let's put Floridians to work at every rung on the income ladder, and ensure that Floridians have good jobs that don't require them to have three jobs.
Let's protect and expand our access to quality, affordable healthcare, and pass a law so that no Floridian with a pre-existing condition will be discriminated against.
Let's invest in the kind of clean energy future that provides good paying jobs AND protects our state's natural beauty. We need to turn the Sunshine State into the Solar Capital of the United States - and those are jobs you can't outsource overseas.
Let's build an education system that puts our kids first, rewards our teachers, and concentrates on learning, not high-stakes testing.
Let's invest in building a 21st century infrastructure that creates jobs, increases tourism, cuts down on travel times, and ensures that our residents can travel safely on all of our public ways.
Let's give our high school students the skills they need to get a job with dignity, and if they choose college, let's make sure they don't go into a lifetime of debt just to get that degree.
Let's ensure that every family can feel safe in their homes, in our great public parks, in their schools - anywhere. Let's not back down to the gun lobby when we say we want common sense gun reforms that protect the safety of our communities.
And let's give every Floridian the opportunity they need to succeed and live a fulfilled life - regardless of sexual orientation, gender identity, race, religion, creed, ability, class, age, or if you were born here or any country in the world.
We can be that kind of state, and I will be that kind of Governor, as long as we're all willing to come together and do what it takes to win. And that's why I'm asking:
[**Will you chip in to our campaign now, and help us make all of this possible for our future?**](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3324/9e00690/4be3881c/2403715f/2119862396/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ag-may2017?refcode=em20170528-eom")
Our end of month deadline is approaching quickly -- but I know that with your help, we will have the resources we need to win. Thank you for everything.
Bring it home,
Andrew
**[CONTRIBUTE](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3324/9e00690/4be3881c/2403715f/2119862396/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ag-may2017?refcode=em20170528-eom")**

Paid by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3324/9e00690/4be3881c/2403715e/2119862396/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/ "http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip="). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3324/9e00690/4be3881c/24037151/2119862396/VEsD/ "https://gillum.cp.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe/"). [You can support our campaign by making a donation.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3324/9e00690/4be3881c/24037150/2119862396/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ag-footer")
